system.description:
You grab the enemy and hold onto them. They are now Corps-a-Corps with you. The enemy cannot get away from you unless they make a Grapple check against your Might using a Minor Action. If you are trying to Grapple an armed opponent, you have a Penalty Die. They may also attempt to Parry your Grapple, in which case you take [[/r 1d3]] damage to the hand if they succeed.

NOTE: Grapple sets you up to use the Choke/Crush and Disarm Maneuvers as well.
system.mastery: Bonus Die to Grapple rolls, +1 to resist Grapples
